data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of service selection and time picking without leaving the app. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that the booking interface operates within the app environment as required. The linked use case specifies this need, but the absence of concrete evidence showing the functionality of the mini-booking interface within Instagram or Facebook leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that service selection and time picking occurs without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
